T0186.title: Subscriber Lookup
T0186.definition: In illicit data trading, refers to the personal information of the actual user or registered owner of a phone number, including name, national ID number, and linked accounts.
T0186.description: In illicit data trading, refers to the personal information of the actual user or registered owner of a phone number, including name, national ID number, and linked accounts.
T0186.usageExample: "Phone owner info at 4 USD each, orders fulfilled via insider access, any escrow accepted, priority for those with existing groups"
